SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.persist

Class ScanFileIO

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.persist.ScanFileIO
public class ScanFileIO extends Object
Public API for saving and loading encrypted .dvscan scan files and plain JSON scan snapshots.

v2 format uses envelope encryption with dual KEK slots (machine key + optional password). v1 files are read transparently for backward compatibility.

Author:
Milton Smith

  • Constructor Details

    • ScanFileIO

      public ScanFileIO()

  • Method Details

    • save

      public static String save(File file, ScanSnapshot snapshot, ScanFileMode mode, byte[] machineKey, char[] password) throws IOException
      Save a scan snapshot using the specified encryption mode.
      Parameters:
      file - output file
      snapshot - scan data to save
      mode - encryption mode (PLAIN_TEXT, HOST_LOCKED, PASSWORD_LOCKED)
      machineKey - 32-byte machine key (ignored for PLAIN_TEXT)
      password - transfer password (required for PASSWORD_LOCKED, ignored otherwise)
      Returns:
      scanId (SHA-256 hex of the written file)
      Throws:
      IOException - on write or encryption failure

    • savePlainText

      public static String savePlainText(File file, ScanSnapshot snapshot) throws IOException
      Save as plain text JSON (no encryption). The file is portable to any machine but scan data is not protected.
      Parameters:
      file - output file
      snapshot - scan data to save
      Returns:
      scanId (SHA-256 hex of the written file)
      Throws:
      IOException - on write failure

    • save

      public static String save(File file, ScanSnapshot snapshot, byte[] machineKey) throws IOException
      Save with machine-key only (host locked, zero-friction on same machine).
      Throws:
      IOException

    • save

      public static String save(File file, ScanSnapshot snapshot, byte[] machineKey, char[] password) throws IOException
      Save with password only (password locked, always requires password to open). If password is null or empty, falls back to host locked (machine key only).
      Throws:
      IOException

    • load

      public static ScanSnapshot load(File file, byte[] machineKey) throws IOException
      Load with machine key only. Throws if password is required.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • load

      public static ScanSnapshot load(File file, byte[] machineKey, ScanFileIO.PasswordCallback passwordCallback) throws IOException
      Load a scan file with machine key + optional password callback. Auto-detects the file format: encrypted binary (v1/v2) or plain JSON.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • toJson

      public static String toJson(ScanSnapshot snapshot)
      Serialize a snapshot to plain JSON (no encryption).

    • fromJson

      public static ScanSnapshot fromJson(String json)
      Deserialize a snapshot from a plain JSON string.

    • fromJson

      public static ScanSnapshot fromJson(InputStream in) throws IOException
      Deserialize a snapshot from a plain JSON input stream.
      Throws:
      IOException
